Work

Boost brand recognition as a top institution with innovative programs.

Universidad de los Andes — Marketing Programs

Book a strategy session
The Brief

Market two groundbreaking master's programs to a global audience in partnership with Coursera.

Challenge

Position Universidad de los Andes as a leading educational institution beyond its local network — building a marketing campaign with aspirational animations and art pieces to promote cutting-edge programs, showcasing the university at the forefront of innovation and knowledge.

Solution

A sophisticated, globally aspirational campaign.

We designed a sophisticated global advertising campaign characterized by visually stunning art pieces and animation — effectively capturing the aspirational, cutting-edge essence of the two master's programs and amplifying the university's reach beyond its regional borders.

The Impact

Expanded

Global reach and influence, positioning Universidad de los Andes as a key player in shaping the future across fields.

Increased

Enrollment and interest from prospective students seeking innovative educational opportunities, locally and internationally.

More of our work

D2L — Connection Experience

Designing and executing an event series engaging D2L leaders with customers.

Ellucian — EdTech Sessions Experience

LACUC 2024 — an immersive event blending Cartagena's magic with Ellucian's vision.

Begin your journey to growth.
